nasb.text: In it was written, “It is reported among the nations, and Gashmu says, that you and the Jews are planning to rebel; therefore you are rebuilding the wall. And you are to be their king, according to these reports.

esv.text: In it was written, “It is reported among the nations, and Geshem also says it, that you and the Jews intend to rebel; that is why you are building the wall. And according to these reports you wish to become their king.

cnv.text: 信上寫著：“在各民族中有這樣的傳說，善基也說：‘你和猶大人陰謀造反，所以你才重建城牆，據說，你還想要作他們的王。’

ccb.text: 上面写着：“各国都在谣传，基善也说，你和犹太人计划谋反，因而才修建城墙，据说你要做他们的王。
